news.title: Bitcoin Falls on Iran War Uncertainty, U.S. Rate Rise Bets
news.summary: Bitcoin edges lower as uncertainty over the Middle East conflict remains heightened and as traders bet on the Federal Reserve raising interest rates. President Trump said Wednesday that negotiations with Iran are in the "final stages" but warned the US will have to get "a little bit nasty" if no deal is reached.

news.title: Gold Falls as Fed Minutes Show Policymakers Open to Rate Hikes

news.title: Chinese Equities Market's Rally Mainly Supported by Strong AI Sector Momentum
news.summary: The Chinese equities market's rally is mainly supported by strongmomentum in the artificial-intelligence sector, but risks remain, according to HSBC analysts in a research note.  Despite continued Middle East tensions, China's market remains resilient in the face of elevated oil prices and potential inflation issues, they say.  The key risk for the AI sector comes from high valuation levels and higher interest rates in the U.S., they note.

news.title: Asian stocks surge on Iran hopes, Samsung union talks
news.summary:
Shares surged in Seoul, Tokyo and other Asian markets on Thursday, fuelled by hopes of a Middle East peace accord and by negotiations averting a planned strike at Samsung Electronics.- Strike on hold -
Samsung Electronics closed 8.5 percent higher, after its labour union said late Wednesday that an 18-day strike had been put on hold.
